_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: In 51 of 58 injected mice, we detected a bioluminescent signal, indicating successful viral transduction and transgene expression.
details: Successfully transduced 51 of 58 injected mice with detectable bioluminescent signal indicating viral transduction and transgene expression
